items.briefing:
Australian organisations using AI tools within their business systems should take note of a timely reminder today: when AI is integrated into platforms like ERP software, your data may be shared with or processed by third-party providers, sometimes without clear visibility over where it ends up. This raises real privacy and compliance risks, particularly under Australian privacy law. Separately, new AI-powered cybersecurity tools are being launched locally by vendors including OpenText, which may help businesses better detect and respond to threats.

A global report also highlights that organisations are struggling to keep up with patching known vulnerabilities, leaving systems exposed for longer than they should be. **Practical tip:** If your organisation uses any AI-assisted software, ask your vendor directly where your data is stored and processed, and whether it leaves Australia.

featured.title: Using AI in your ERP? You should know where your data goes
featured.quote: Australian finance teams must understand where ERP AI data travels across borders.
